title: Wren's Nerd Pack
description: Im wren and this is my nerd pack, you never know whats going to come though that door
body:
My personal client side modpack, a big mix of pretty much everything you could want.
- Game Optimizations and preformance improvements
- lots of tech centered mods for late game players, stuff like tweekeroo and litematica
- QoL Mods like world maps, better pickblock, and more inv functionallity
- Aesthetic changes aswell as support for shaders and all sorts of special reasource pack functions
- Various one-off fun mods
